name: Scottish Cheddar Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions: Melt the butter in a saucepan and cook the onions for a few minutes. Add the flour and cook for another minute. Stir in the milk and stock, bring to the boil, season, and simmer gently for about 5 minutes. Toss the grated cheese gently into the soup and simmer until melted. Do not allow to boil.
